selectionNote: Generated through app studio synth API with Aryan/Puck, Neha/Kore, Raj/Charon, Priya/Zephyr.

entries.title: Morning Smart Home Chat
entries.direction: Cheerful, playful handoffs with a natural wake-up rhythm.
entries.summary: A light two-voice morning exchange with weather and reminder cues.

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [cheerfully] Hey Neha! Good morning — quick heads up before you start your day.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [sleepily] Mm... yeah go ahead, what's up?

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [playfully] So, it's 24 degrees outside, pretty sunny — great day to not stay indoors.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [laughs] You literally say that every day.

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [warmly] Because every day you stay indoors! Anyway — your 10 AM standup is still on.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [sighs] Ugh, fine. Okay. Coffee first though.

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [bright] Obviously. Go go go!

entries.title: Customer Support Call
entries.direction: Empathetic escalation with reassurance and clear resolution cues.
entries.summary: A Hindi support conversation with escalation and supervisor intervention.

lines.speaker: Raj
lines.text: [frustrated] Yaar, mera order abhi tak nahi aaya — teen din ho gaye hain!

lines.speaker: Priya
lines.text: [calmly] Arrey, main samajh sakti hoon aapki baat. Ek second, main check karti hoon.

lines.speaker: Priya
lines.text: [reassuringly] Haan, aapka order kal dispatch hua hai — kal shaam tak aa jayega pakka.

lines.speaker: Raj
lines.text: [doubtfully] Pakka? Pehle bhi yahi bola tha na...

lines.speaker: Priya
lines.text: [gently] Main guarantee de rahi hoon is baar. Aur agar nahi aaya toh—

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [professionally] Main supervisor Aryan bol raha hoon — hum personally ensure karenge delivery. Sorry for the wait!

lines.speaker: Raj
lines.text: [relieved] Okay okay, theek hai. Thanks yaar.

entries.title: Delivery Update Chat
entries.direction: Upbeat status exchange with playful but clear logistics pacing.
entries.summary: A Spanish two-voice delivery handoff with timing confirmation.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [upbeat] ¡Ey! Tu paquete está casi en tu puerta.

lines.speaker: Raj
lines.text: [surprised] ¿En serio? ¿Ya?

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [cheerfully] ¡Sí! El repartidor llega entre las 3 y las 5. ¡Hoy es el día!

lines.speaker: Raj
lines.text: [playfully] Buf, por fin — llevaba esperándolo como una semana.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [warmly] Lo sabemos, perdona la espera. ¿Estarás en casa a esa hora?

lines.speaker: Raj
lines.text: [casually] Sí sí, no me muevo. Gracias eh.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [bright] ¡Perfecto! ¡Que lo disfrutes!

entries.title: Podcast Style Roundtable
entries.direction: Conversational panel cadence with dynamic but readable handoffs.
entries.summary: A four-voice English roundtable discussing TTS quality and expression.

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [enthusiastically] Alright folks, welcome back! Today we're talking about AI voices — and it's gonna get nerdy.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [laughs] I mean, when does it NOT get nerdy with us?

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [playfully] Fair point. So Raj, you've been testing Gemini TTS — first impressions?

lines.speaker: Raj
lines.text: [casually] Honestly? Way better than I expected. Like the emotions actually land, you know?

lines.speaker: Priya
lines.text: [thoughtfully] That's the thing — most TTS engines fake emotion. Gemini actually reads context.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [curious] So like, it figures out the vibe from the sentence itself?

lines.speaker: Priya
lines.text: [warmly] Exactly. You write "ugh, not again" — it doesn't need a tag. It just... gets it.

lines.speaker: Aryan
lines.text: [impressed] That's wild. Okay we are definitely doing a full demo next episode.

lines.speaker: Neha
lines.text: [bright] Subscribe people — you don't wanna miss that one!
